headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Valuation Check After Strong 1 Year Share Price Performance
summary: GE Vernova: recent returns and scale GE Vernova (GEV) has drawn fresh attention after a strong run in its stock, with the price up 6% over the past month and about 31% over the past 3 months. The company, valued at about US$293b, reported revenue of US$39,375.0m and net income of US$9,375.0m. These results are spread across the Power, Wind, and Electrification segments, with operations across several major regions. See our latest analysis for GE Vernova.
